name: 12 Mini Battles 2
author: Poki
description: Get ready for more 2 player action in 12 Mini Battles 2! Just like its predecessor 12 MiniBattles, this is a multiplayer party battle game where you face your friends in 12 different minigames. Are you ready to battle it out? Grab a friend and see who comes out on top! In this version of the game there's basketball, street racing, duck shooting, foosball and many other cool challenges to battle it out in. You’ll be give a battle at random to see who can stay on their toes and become the ultimate champion of all 12 MiniBattles! How to play 12 Mini Battles 2? A - Player 1 L - Player 2 Who created 12 Mini Battles 2? 12 Mini Battles 2 was created by Shared Dreams Studio. Play their other games on Poki: 12 MiniBattles , MiniMissions and MiniBattles ! How can I play 12 Mini Battles 2 for free? You can play 12 Mini Battles 2 for free on Poki. Can I play 12 Mini Battles 2 on mobile devices and desktop? 12 Mini Battles 2 can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play 12 Mini Battles 2 with my friend? Yes! 12 Mini Battles 2 is a multiplayer game so you can play locally with your friends!
